reviews.review_description:
Graphics 8/10 
Pretty decent

Sound 1/10 
Say "Pew.. Pew.. Pew" 
Congratulations you make better sound effects than this game.


Immersion 1/10
For a minute I thought I had died of boredom and was a zombie. I only realised my mistake when I tried to end it all by Pew Pewing myself in the head with the vr controller.

Presentation 1/10
Menu? Options? What menu? What options? 

Story 0/10
On par with Tetris... or Pong.

Overall 

1/10
I'm not even asking for a refund. Just take my money get a coffee and have a think about how you're gonna fix this
